default.tagline: Nurturing Young Minds Through Fun & Digital Learning

hero.title: Online Preschool for Pre KG, LKG & UKG
hero.subtitle: Give your child a strong foundation with interactive online classes, creative activities, and expert guidance — all from the comfort of home.

preview.title: A joyful start to your child’s learning journey
preview.description: Kinder Prime International offers structured and engaging online classes for Pre KG, LKG, and UKG students. Our program focuses on developing creativity, communication, and foundational skills through fun activities and guided learning.

schedule.title: Class Schedule
details: Two sessions per day (40 mins each)

features: Eligible for any syllabus after completion

reviews.name: Aisha Rahman
reviews.text: Very engaging classes. My child enjoys learning every day and has improved a lot in communication.

reviews.text: Affordable and structured. Teachers are very supportive and caring.

reviews.text: Great online preschool option with fun activities and good learning balance.
